title: PM Cram point-and-click question
description: A 2026-style point-and-click question: a graphic with hidden hotspot regions. The candidate taps the correct location(s) on the image. The figure is a theme-aware inline SVG; regions are rectangular hotspots in the SVG's viewBox coordinate space. id is optional (derived).

id.description: OPTIONAL — derived from content if omitted.

prompt.description: The question / instruction (e.g. 'Tap the activity that is NOT on the critical path').

svg.description: Inline theme-aware <svg> with a viewBox (use currentColor for ink). Regions are positioned in this viewBox's coordinate space.

regions.description: Rectangular hotspots, in the figure's viewBox coordinates. At least one must be correct.

correct.description: True for a correct hotspot (default false).

label.description: Short label shown on review for this region.

why.description: Why this region is right/wrong, shown on review.

select.description: How many hotspots to pick. Defaults to the number of correct regions.
